title: narcissus pseudonarcissus subsp. minor
intro: Narcissus pseudonarcissus subsp. minor, also known as the lesser jonquil or minor narcissus, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the genus Narcissus and is a type of daffodil. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and its potential to have antiviral and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of the lesser jonquil include its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to help lower blood pressure and improve circulation. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to note that proper identification and dosage are crucial when utilizing the plant for medicinal purposes.
